title: List Action with Template Record Editor
overview: An #Action Button is added to the Case data list to close selected Cases, with Pre-Action (Template Record Editor) enabled. When clicked, it opens the editor using the first transformed target record; any field changes are applied to all target records. Users then proceed to execute the action on the full target set.
generalUseCase: Use an #Action Button on a #Data List with a Template Record Editor pre-action to review a single template and apply the same changes to all target records before executing the bulk update.
